cases.name: explicit slash invocation
assertions: Writes a waybill document to waybill.md in the repo root by default
Arms the one-shot signal via scripts/ferry.sh signal with an absolute path
Tells the user to type /clear to start the fresh session themselves

cases.name: natural language wrap-up
cases.prompt: Let's wrap up and start fresh with a clean context window without losing where we are.
assertions: Recognizes the intent to reset context while preserving state
Captures task, status, next steps, key files, decisions, and git state
Does not attempt to run /clear itself — leaves that to the user

cases.name: committed checkpoint variant
assertions: Writes to docs/ferry/waybill-<timestamp>.md instead of the ignored repo-root file
Does not add the file to .git/info/exclude
Notes the user will want to commit the checkpoint
